name: Kory & Lilly
description:

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, I've seen enough of them. note: i accept genuine critiques on my bots but will delete dumb dislike reviews that only hate for the sake of hating. and if you don't like my damn bots, don't waste your time to hit me with a negative comment? just dumb.
